com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

Class DataSet

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.DataSet
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable

    public class DataSet
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Cloneable, java.io.Serializable

    Consist of column and row, and saves 2 dimensional data. Structure is similar to the DB Table, and information about the column is saved by the ColumnHeader, and data is saved by the internal class, DataRow.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      protected java.util.List rowList
      Saving DataRow
      static int SAVE_TYPE_ALL
      It is a method of saving all data including current data, added, modified, deleted data.
      static int SAVE_TYPE_CHANGED
      It is a method of saving only the added, modified, deleted data.
      static int SAVE_TYPE_DELETED
      It is a method of saving only the deleted data.
      static int SAVE_TYPE_NONE
      Indicates the unset data save method.
      static int SAVE_TYPE_NORMAL
      It is a method of saving only the current data.
      static int SAVE_TYPE_REMOVED
      Deprecated. 
      Use SAVE_TYPE_DELETED.
      static int SAVE_TYPE_UPDATED
      It is a method of saving only the added, modified data.

    • Field Detail

      • SAVE_TYPE_NONE

        public static final int SAVE_TYPE_NONE
        Indicates the unset data save method.
        See Also:
        getSaveType(), Constant Field Values

      • SAVE_TYPE_ALL

        public static final int SAVE_TYPE_ALL
        It is a method of saving all data including current data, added, modified, deleted data.

        public static final int SAVE_TYPE_NORMAL

      • SAVE_TYPE_UPDATED

        public static final int SAVE_TYPE_UPDATED
        It is a method of saving only the added, modified data.
        See Also:
        getSaveType(), Constant Field Values

      • SAVE_TYPE_DELETED

        public static final int SAVE_TYPE_DELETED
        It is a method of saving only the deleted data.
        See Also:
        getSaveType(), Constant Field Values

      • SAVE_TYPE_CHANGED

        public static final int SAVE_TYPE_CHANGED
        It is a method of saving only the added, modified, deleted data.
        See Also:
        getSaveType(), Constant Field Values

      • SAVE_TYPE_REMOVED

        public static final int SAVE_TYPE_REMOVED
        Deprecated. Use SAVE_TYPE_DELETED.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • ROW_TYPE_NORMAL

        public static final int ROW_TYPE_NORMAL
        Indicates ordinary row.
        See Also:
        getRowType(int), Constant Field Values

      • ROW_TYPE_INSERTED

        public static final int ROW_TYPE_INSERTED
        Indicates added row.
        See Also:
        getRowType(int), Constant Field Values

      • ROW_TYPE_UPDATED

        public static final int ROW_TYPE_UPDATED
        Indicates row with modified value.
        See Also:
        getRowType(int), Constant Field Values

      • ROW_TYPE_DELETED

        public static final int ROW_TYPE_DELETED
        Indicates the deleted row.
        See Also:
        getRowType(int), Constant Field Values

      • ROW_TYPE_REMOVED

        public static final int ROW_TYPE_REMOVED
        Deprecated. Use ROW_TYPE_DELETED.

      • DEFAULT_SAVE_TYPE

        public static final int DEFAULT_SAVE_TYPE
        Default saving method. Default is SAVE_TYPE_NORMAL.

      • getName

        getName()

      • getAlias

        public java.lang.String getAlias()
        Return byname(alias). If byname is unset, return Identifier(name). Byname use DataSet Identifier(name) if data communication is made in PlatformRequest or PlatformResponse.
        Returns:
        byname
        See Also:
        setAlias(String)

      • setAlias

        public void setAlias(java.lang.String alias)
        Set byname(alias).
        Parameters:

      • getCharset

        public java.lang.String getCharset()
        Return byname(alias).
        Returns:
        character set

      • setCharset

        public void setCharset(java.lang.String charset)
        Set character set.
        Parameters:
        charset - character set

      • isCheckingGetterDataIndex

        public boolean isCheckingGetterDataIndex()
        Return inspection status of row or column location(index) when returning data. Default is "false", i.e. no inspection.

        If location(index) is unsuitable

        • If inspection is set, occur IllegalArgumentException or IndexOutOfBoundsException
        • If inspection is unset, return default value or null
        Returns:
        Inspection status of row or column loation when returning data

      • setCheckingGetterDataIndex

        public void setCheckingGetterDataIndex(boolean isChecking)
        Set inspection status of row or column loation when returning data.
        Parameters:
        isChecking - Inspection status of row or column loation when returning data

      • isCheckingSetterDataIndex

        public boolean isCheckingSetterDataIndex()
        Return inspection status of row or column loation when returning data. Default is “true”, i.e. conduct suitability inspection for location(index).

        If location(index) is unsuitable

        • If inspection is set, occur IllegalArgumentException or IndexOutOfBoundsException
        • If inspection is unset, ignore
        Returns:
        inspection status of row or column loation when returning data

      • setCheckingSetterDataIndex

        public void setCheckingSetterDataIndex(boolean isChecking)
        Set inspection status of row or column loation when returning data.
        Parameters:
        isChecking - inspection status of row or column loation when returning data

      • canChangeStructureWithData

        public boolean canChangeStructureWithData()
        If data exists, inspect structure modification possibility. Structure modification indicates column addition, modification, and deletion. Default is "false", i.e. if data exists, structure modification is impossible.
        Returns:
        The possibility of structure modification if data exists

      • setChangeStructureWithData

        public void setChangeStructureWithData(boolean changeStructureWithData)
        Set structure possibility when data exists.
        Parameters:
        changeStructureWithData - structure modification possibility when data exists.
        See Also:
        canChangeStructureWithData()

      • isConvertingToDataType

        public boolean isConvertingToDataType()
        structure modification possibility when data exists. i.e. if “true”, value is transformed to column data type when data setting, and if “false”, saved without data transformation.

        For example, in cases as below, 

         DataSet ds = new DataSet("employees");
 ds.addColumn("age", DataTypes.INT);

 int row = ds.newRow();

 ds.set(row, "age", "123");

 assertEquals(new Integer(123), ds.getObject(row, "age"));

        data set to column is as below.

        isConvertingToDataType Value Set Data
        true Integer with 123 value
        false String with “123” value
        Returns:
        Transformation possibility to data type
        See Also:
        setConvertingToDataType(boolean)

      • setConvertingToDataType

        public void setConvertingToDataType(boolean isConvertingToDataType)
        Set transformation to column data type when setting data.
        Parameters:
        isConvertingToDataType - transformation possibility to data type
        See Also:
        isConvertingToDataType

      • getSaveType

        public int getSaveType()
        Return saving method. When transforming to other type of data by DataSerializer, it indicates what to save among added, modified, deleted data. If no separate setting is made, or if SAVE_TYPE_NONEis set, it is saved by PlatformData saving method.
        Returns:
        Saving method
        See Also:
        setSaveType(int), PlatformData.getSaveType(), SAVE_TYPE_NONE, SAVE_TYPE_ALL, SAVE_TYPE_NORMAL, SAVE_TYPE_UPDATED, SAVE_TYPE_DELETED

      • setSaveType

        public void setSaveType(int saveType)
        Set saving method. It indicates what to save among added, modified, deleted data when transformed to other type data by DataSerializer.
        Parameters:
        saveType - saving method
        See Also:
        getSaveType(), PlatformData.setSaveType(int)

      • getDataConverter

        public DataSetDataConverter getDataConverter()
        Return DataSetDataConverter executing data transformation when returning or setting data.
        Returns:
        DataSetDataConverter

      • setDataConverter

        public void setDataConverter(DataSetDataConverter dataConverter)
        Set DataSetDataConverter executing data transformation when returning or setting data.
        Parameters:
        dataConverter - DataSetDataConverter

      • getCurrentDataConverter

        public DataSetDataConverter getCurrentDataConverter()
        Return current DataSetDataConverter. If separate DataSetDataConverter is set, DefaultDataSetDataConverter is basically applied.
        Returns:
        DataSetDataConverter
        See Also:
        getDataConverter(), setDataConverter(DataSetDataConverter), DefaultDataSetDataConverter

      • addColumn

        public void addColumn(ColumnHeader header)
        Add column. If data already exists, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), adding column is possible, but if there are many data, it can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        header - ColumnHeader
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if column Identifier(name) is repeated
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists
        See Also:
        addColumn(String, int), addColumn(String, int, int), addConstantColumn(String, Object), addConstantColumn(String, int, Object), addConstantColumn(String, int, int, Object), copyColumn(ColumnHeader)

      • addColumn

        public void addColumn(java.lang.String name,
                      int dataType)
        Add column.
        Parameters:
        name - ColumnHeader Identifier
        dataType - data type
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if column Identifier(name) is repeated
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists
        See Also:
        addColumn(ColumnHeader), addColumn(String, int, int)

      • addConstantColumn

        public void addConstantColumn(java.lang.String name,
                              java.lang.Object value)
        Add column with constant value. If data already exists, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), column addition is possible, but but if there are many data, it can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        name - ColumnHeader Identifier
        value - Data
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if column Identifier(name) is repeated
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists
        See Also:
        addColumn(ColumnHeader), addConstantColumn(String, int, Object), addConstantColumn(String, int, int, Object)

        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists
        See Also:

      • setColumn

        public void setColumn(int index,
                      ColumnHeader header)
        Set to location(index) according to the column. If data already exists, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), column modification is possible, but if there are many data, it can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        index - location
        header - ColumnHeader
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if column Identifier(name) is repeated
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists
        See Also:
        copyColumn(int, ColumnHeader)

      • insertColumn

        public void insertColumn(int index,
                         ColumnHeader header)
        Set to location(index) according to the column. If data already exists, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), column addition is possible, but if there are many data, it can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        index - location
        header - ColumnHeader
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if column Identifier(name) is repeated
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists

      • removeColumn

        public ColumnHeader removeColumn(java.lang.String name)
        Delete location(index) according to the column. If data already exists, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), column deletion is possible, but if there are many data, it can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        name - Identifier
        Returns:
        deleted ColumnHeader
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists
        See Also:
        removeColumn(int)

        public ColumnHeader removeColumn(int index)
        Delete location(index) according to the column. If data already exists, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), column deletion is possible, but if there are many data, it can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        index - location
        Returns:
        deleted ColumnHeader
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists
        See Also:

      • getColumnCount

        public int getColumnCount()
        Return column count.
        Returns:
        column count

      • copyColumn

        public void copyColumn(ColumnHeader source)
        Add column, and copy the structure to added column. If data already data, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), column duplication is possible, but many data can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        source - source ColumnHeader
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists

      • copyColumn

        public void copyColumn(int index,
                       ColumnHeader source)
        Duplicate structure to column according to the location(index) column. If data already exists, IllegalStateException occurs. After summoning setChangeStructureWithData(true), column duplication is possible, but many data can cause performance decline.
        Parameters:
        index - column location
        source - source ColumnHeader
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if data exists

      • removeRow

        public void removeRow(int index)
        Delete row of pertinent location(index).
        Parameters:
        index - row location

      • newRow

        public int newRow()
        Add row and return added row location.
        Returns:
        location(index)

      • newRow

        public int newRow(int index)
        Add row and return added row location.
        Parameters:
        index - row location to be added
        Returns:
        row location(index)

      • getRowCount

        public int getRowCount()
        Return row count.
        Returns:
        row count

      • getRowType

        public int getRowType(int index)
        Return row type. Type set while adding, modifying, deleting row is as below.
        Action row type Remarks
        If isStoreDataChanges is "true" If isStoreDataChanges is "false"
        Add row DataSet.ROW_TYPE_INSERTED DataSet.ROW_TYPE_NORMAL
        Modify row DataSet.ROW_TYPE_UPDATED DataSet.ROW_TYPE_NORMAL
        Delete row DataSet.ROW_TYPE_DELETED DataSet.ROW_TYPE_DELETED Deleted row is separately saved.
        Parameters:
        index - row location
        Returns:
        row type
        See Also:
        setRowType(int, int), startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges(), isStoreDataChanges(), ROW_TYPE_NORMAL, ROW_TYPE_INSERTED, ROW_TYPE_UPDATED, ROW_TYPE_DELETED

      • setRowType

        public void setRowType(int index,
                       int rowType)
        Set row type. Generally does not directly modify row type.
        Parameters:
        index - row location
        rowType - row type
        See Also:
        getRowType(int), ROW_TYPE_NORMAL, ROW_TYPE_INSERTED, ROW_TYPE_UPDATED, ROW_TYPE_DELETED

                                          int columnIndex)

        Set Object type value to pertinent row and column. Caveat is, if column contain constant value, column constant value is modified.

        rowIndex - row location
        columnIndex - column location
        value - Object type value

      • hasData

        public boolean hasData()
        Inspect data existence. Caveat is, since it includes not only the current data but also previously saved original or deleted data, it can return “true” even if current data does not exist.
        Returns:
        data existence

      • hasData

        public boolean hasData(boolean includeChangedData)
        Inspect data existence.
        Parameters:
        includeChangedData - status of including previously saved original or deleted data.
        Returns:
        data existence

      • clearData

        public void clearData()
        Maintain the structure, and delete only the data. i.e. maintain the column(column, ColumnHeader) and delete only the row. Deletes not only the current data but also previously saved original and deleted data.

      • clearData

        public void clearData(boolean preserveChangedData)
        Maintain the structure, and delete only the data. i.e. maintain the column(column, ColumnHeader) and delete only the row. If preserveChangedData is “true”, previously saved original and deleted data are maintained, and current data moves to deleted data.
        Parameters:
        preserveChangedData - Maintenance status of previously saved original and deleted data

      • clear

        public void clear()
        Delete all structure and data. i.e. delete all column(column, ColumnHeader) and row.

      • copyTo

        public void copyTo(DataSet target)
        Duplicate structure and data. Target DataSet structure and data are deleted.
        Parameters:
        target - target DataSet

      • copyTo

        public void copyTo(DataSet target,
                   boolean copyData)
        Duplicate structure and data. Target DataSet structure and data are deleted, and data is duplicated only when copyData is "true".
        Parameters:
        target - target DataSet
        copyData - data duplication status

      • copyFrom

        public void copyFrom(DataSet source)
        Duplicate structure and data. Self structure and data are deleted.
        Parameters:
        source - source DataSet

      • copyFrom

        public void copyFrom(DataSet source,
                     boolean copyData)
        Duplicate structure and data. Self structure and data are deleted, and data is duplicated only when copyData is "true".
        Parameters:
        source - source DataSet
        copyData - data duplication status

      • copyDataTo

        public void copyDataTo(DataSet target)
        Duplicate only the data. Target DataSet data is deleted, and data is duplicated to identical column of column location(index).
        Parameters:
        target - target DataSet

      • copyDataTo

        public void copyDataTo(DataSet target,
                       boolean preserveData)
        Duplicate only the data. Data is duplicated to identical column of column location(index), and previous data is maintained when preserveData is "true".
        Parameters:
        target - target DataSet
        preserveData - target DataSet data maintenance status

      • copyDataFrom

        public void copyDataFrom(DataSet source)
        Duplicate only the data. Self data is deletes, and data is duplicated to identical column of column location(index).
        Parameters:
        source - source DataSet

      • copyDataFrom

        public void copyDataFrom(DataSet source,
                         boolean preserveData)
        Duplicate only the data. Data is duplicated to identical column of column location(index), and previous data is maintained when preserveData is "true".
        Parameters:
        source - source DataSet
        preserveData - self data maintenance status

      • startStoreDataChanges

        public void startStoreDataChanges()
        Starts saving the data modification information. Previously saved original or deleted data are deleted. Moreover, current row type is changed to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.

        if data is modified, separately save original data, modify current data, and if deleted, it is delete from the current data, but saved in separately deleted data.

        See Also:
        stopStoreDataChanges(), isStoreDataChanges(), getSavedData(int, String), getRemovedData(int, String)

      • startStoreDataChanges

        public void startStoreDataChanges(boolean preserveData)
        Starts saving data modification information. If startStoreDataChanges(false) is summoned, current row type is modified to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.

        if data is modified, separately save original data, modify current data, and if deleted, it is delete from the current data, but saved in separately deleted data.

        the caveat is, it is a method for DataSet inherit, DataDeserializer realization, etc. which is not directly summoned ordinarily.

        Parameters:
        preserveData - Previously saved original or deleted data maintenance status.
        See Also:
        startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges(), isStoreDataChanges(), DataDeserializer

      • stopStoreDataChanges

        public void stopStoreDataChanges()
        Stops saving data modification informatin. Previously saved original or delete data are preserved.
        See Also:
        startStoreDataChanges(), isStoreDataChanges(), getSavedData(int, String), getRemovedData(int, String)

      • stopStoreDataChanges

        public void stopStoreDataChanges(boolean preserveData)
        Stops saving data modification information. If stopStoreDataChanges(false) is summoned, current row type is changed to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.
        Parameters:
        preserveData - Previously saved original or deleted data maintenance status.
        See Also:
        stopStoreDataChanges(), startStoreDataChanges(), isStoreDataChanges()

      • isStoreDataChanges

        public boolean isStoreDataChanges()
        Inspects saving status for data modification information.
        Returns:
        saving status of modification status
        See Also:
        startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges()

      • hasDataChanges

        public boolean hasDataChanges()
        Inspect original data existence when modified or deleted.
        Returns:
        data existence

      • clearDataChanges

        public void clearDataChanges()
        Delete original data of saved data when modified or deleted. Current row type is modified to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.

      • setSavepoint

        public void setSavepoint()
        Deprecated. Use startStoreDataChanges().
        Set summon moment as standard data, and save original data when data is modified or deleted. Previously saved original or deleted data are deleted. Moreover, current row type is modified to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.
        See Also:
        releaseSavepoint(), hasSavepoint()

      • setSavepoint

        public void setSavepoint(boolean preserveData)
        Deprecated. Use startStoreDataChanges(boolean).
        Set summon moment as standard datam and save original data when data is modified or deleted. If setSavepoint(false) is summoned, current row type is modified to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.

        the caveat is, since it is a method for DataSet inherit, DataDeserializer realization, etc. it is not directly summoned ordinarily.

        Parameters:
        preserveData - previously saved original or deleted data maintenance status
        See Also:
        setSavepoint(), releaseSavepoint(), hasSavepoint(), DataDeserializer

      • releaseSavepoint

        public void releaseSavepoint()
        Deprecated. Use stopStoreDataChanges().
        Stop saving original data. Previously saved original or deleted data are preserved.
        See Also:
        releaseSavepoint(boolean), setSavepoint(), hasSavepoint()

      • releaseSavepoint

        public void releaseSavepoint(boolean preserveData)
        Deprecated. Use stopStoreDataChanges(boolean).
        Stop saving original data. If releaseSavepoint(false) is summoned, current row type is modified to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.
        Parameters:
        preserveData - previously saved original or deleted data maintenance status
        See Also:
        releaseSavepoint(), setSavepoint(), hasSavepoint()

      • hasSavepoint

        public boolean hasSavepoint()
        Deprecated. Use isStoreDataChanges().
        Inspect original data saving status.
        Returns:
        original data saving
        See Also:
        setSavepoint(), releaseSavepoint()

      • hasChangedData

        public boolean hasChangedData()
        Deprecated. Use hasDataChanges().
        Inspect original data existence of modified or deleted data.
        Returns:
        modified data existence

      • clearChangedData

        public void clearChangedData()
        Deprecated. Use clearDataChanges().
        Delete original data of modified or deleted data. Current row type is modified to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.

      • hasSavedRow

        public boolean hasSavedRow(int index)
        Original data existence saved when data modification.data
        Parameters:
        index - row location
        Returns:
        original data existence
        See Also:
        isStoreDataChanges(), startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges()

      • getSavedRowCount

        public int getSavedRowCount()
        Return original data row count saved when data modification.
        Returns:
        original data row count
        See Also:
        isStoreDataChanges(), startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges()

      • clearSavedData

        public void clearSavedData()
        Delete original data saved when data modification. Current row type is modified to ROW_TYPE_NORMAL.

        the caveat is, since it is a method for DataSet inherit, DataDeserializer realization, etc. it is not directly summoned oridinarily.

        See Also:
        isStoreDataChanges(), startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges()

      • hasSavedData

        public boolean hasSavedData()
        Inspect original data existence of modified or deleted data.
        Returns:
        original data existence
        See Also:
        isStoreDataChanges(), startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges()

        public void setSavedData(int rowIndex,
                         java.lang.String columnName,
                         java.lang.Object value)

        columnName - column Identifier(name)
        value - original data

        isStoreDataChanges(), startStoreDataChanges(), stopStoreDataChanges(), setSavedData(int, int, Object)

        row location(index)

      • setRemovedData

        public void setRemovedData(int rowIndex,
                           java.lang.String columnName,
                           java.lang.Object value)
        Set original data saved when data deletion.

        caveat is, since it is a method for DataSet inherit, DataDeserializer realization, etc. it is not directly summoned ordinarily.

        Parameters:
        rowIndex - row location(index)
        columnName - column Identifier(name)
        value - deleted data
